texto: How're you holding up?" He slid down the wall next to me and handed me a beer."I've had better days." I took a long, satisfying drink and stared at the wall in front of me."Yeah," was his simple reply. "My dad is downstairs. He said this wake sucks." I could hear that he was smiling.I took another swig. "Well, I didn't plan this shindig, but the next funeral I host, I'll make sure it's a rager.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de J.B. Hartnett que provoca temas ligados a amizade. Ao questionar “How're you holding up?" He slid down the wall next to me and handed me a beer."I've had better da…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, humor, loss, com foco em luto e humor.
